ha037b3b8g6b59g4dccgacfdg03ebb8c29375: 'Alf the scrubs in 'ere would probably lose their nerve just lookin' at you. Bunch of drunken layabouts.
hf504c302g5e87g4d26gbd14g9215983008fb: You look like you could kick the arse of half the scrubs in here. Bunch of drunken layabouts.
he6531e79ge9fag4779g8c06g9e552ffd3078: Not me though. I'm as hard as they come, an' I'm itchin' for another fight.
h8d01c144g61aeg438cga091g0a8fd0ed024e: I fight for the Absolute. I carry her brand on my skin.
h11693a89g3eddg45b0g8c4ag62e61d467af8: Good on ya, pal. Next raid, I'm gonna spill some guts in Her name!
h33795e0bg9d7fg4190gac40g7202d9d52273: I could take the whole camp - you included.
hde964611g3ef4g4808g8ea5g69143ad6d0c6: Er... let's hope it don't come to that, yer honour.
h2bc3e662ga6f5g47f9g937ag753ccba87b4a: Ha! Could do with more like you in my next raidin' mob. Keep yer blades sharp.
h0904ce90g7551g4390gad82g23a3de2b6dc6: Speaking of another fight - what's the next raid going to target?
h3efd3550g678dg43a5gaf82g80a2cf075c74: Her ladyship Minthara's tryin' to figure it out, studyin' the warmap.
hd968fb42g8cb8g473agb979ged601aa3caf2: You should talk to her... get the killin' started quicker.
hbab4d534gccd6g40aagb136g402f26cb1a4e: Drow's studyin' the warmap, tryin' to figure it out.
hb72f42b1g2bf1g4284g9234gb3241d9d6a67: The fighting's done for now. Enjoy the feast.
h354c0375g7abfg4e7bga05ag19bf2f2a3a53: Another fight? You should enjoy the spoils of the last one.
h77f1b493gb9d4g47d8g8fb4g1e678136ec6e: I've had my fill of feastin'. Rest of 'em can get fat and fuddled - I wanna kill somethin'!
h54b0ef21g0e00g4ee1gbe49gd2a703f58e1b: You should come on the raid!
hb2e8c204g4016g42e3gbc7bgbae6ce4aecd5: You been out there spillin' blood for the Absolute?
hc87ce1fag9ff9g4083g9e4fg8c9908dd7fae: Smashin'! Wish you was part of my mob.
hd8cb51f3g1fbbg495cg94e4g15e17dd6664d: Carve a mark on the next one you drop so's everyone knows who's in charge around here!
h951fe13ag1cdeg4659g9f8cg97f7ef155792: I've been busy - other matters needed my attention.
hd390482cgfdbbg4b3cg9b3cgc589dcddafe8: Wot's more important than rippin' into some soft-gut? Get out there and kick some arse!
hd4be4a22ge7fcg4f0egb798gd64ef28abb71: Praise the Absolute. And spill some guts in Her honour!
